name: Baked Chickpeas
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the dried chickpeas and place them in a pot. Cover with cold water and bring to a boil. Skim any foam from the surface.
2. Reduce heat and sprinkle with 1 tablespoon of oregano. Simmer for 1 hour.
3. Strain the chickpeas, reserving the liquid.
4. Preheat the oven to 300 degrees.
5. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Sauté onions and chili pepper until soft, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and add garlic and remaining oregano. Mix well.
6. Add the sautéed ingredients and chickpeas to an earthenware or glass oven-proof casserole with a cover. Add about 2 cups of reserved liquid, mix well, cover, and bake for 1 to 1-1/2 hours, or until chickpeas are tender. Add a little more liquid during cooking if needed.
Note: Turn off the heat when finished baking.
